comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for GenLoss (2-knob v1). build.py reads THIS file; manifest.json is the 6-knob desktop-preview manifest. Drive, hiss, and mix (full wet) are baked; random dropouts deferred.
gid_comment: 0x06 = Modulation -> SONAME prefix ZDL_MOD_, matching Fx_MOD_GenLoss.
audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build before trusting the DSP.
